case_title: MARIO BURRELL VS. SHARI WOOLDRIDGE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO PARTICULAR COUNCIL OF THE SOCIETY OF ST. VINCENT DE PAUL
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO ST.VINCENT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDREDD, UNABLE TO FORWARD. RECEIVED AFTER THE MAY 21, 2015 HEARING.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,069.00 FILED BY BURRELL, MARIO AS TO DEFENDANT WOOLDRIDGE, SHARI BENEDITH, LESSY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (3) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE S.F. PARTICULAR COUNCIL ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY LESSY BENEDITH--PROGRAM DIRECTOR; WHO WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT FOR DEFENDANT ST. VINCENT ETC. DEFENDANT SHARI WOOLDRIDGE--WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED APR-23-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENEDITH, LESSY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-27-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WOOLDRIDGE, SHARI

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURRELL, MARIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOOLDRIDGE, SHARI BENEDITH, LESSY THE SAN FRANCISCO PARTICULAR COUNCIL OF THE SOCIETY OF ST. VINCENT DE PAUL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION RE: AMENDING OF CLAIM TO ADD NEW DEFENDANT AND CORRECT PAGE (3) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURRELL, MARIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
